moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins its two-week run at the All England Club on Monday, June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up two weeks of world-class tennis starting Monday. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can a Brit go all the way at Wimbledon this year? The grass court action gets underway on Monday. Game, set, match!

moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America transitions from the group stage to the intense Round of 32, with knockout matches kicking off on Sunday, June 28, 2026.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: No second chances now! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 starts tomorrow. Who's going home, and who's pushing for glory?

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: After their final group game today, England are into the knockouts! The real test begins in the World Cup Round of 32 from tomorrow. Can they go all the way?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place at the iconic Silverstone Circuit from July 3rd to 5th, with practice, qualifying, and the main race on Sunday.

angles.name: High Octane Weekend
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix roars into Silverstone next weekend. Who are you backing for pole position and the win?

angles.name: Home Race Excitement
angles.copy: Silverstone is calling! The British Grand Prix is just days away. Expect speed, drama, and hopefully a home favourite on the podium.

moments.title: England Men's Cricket vs New Zealand Continues
moments.blurb: The Test Match between England Men and New Zealand at Trent Bridge continues today and concludes on Monday, June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Test Match Action
angles.copy: Day 3 of England vs New Zealand at Trent Bridge! Can Stokes' side push for a win or will the Blackcaps hold strong?

angles.name: Cricket Thrills
angles.copy: It's a nail-biter at Trent Bridge! The England Test is still in full swing against New Zealand. Tune in for the latest.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' reclaims the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for its 14th non-consecutive week, tying with 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'Shape Of You'.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Fourteen weeks at number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is dominating the UK Singles Chart. Is it your song of the summer?

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean just tied with some huge tracks for weeks at #1. A modern classic in the making?

moments.title: Enola Holmes 3 Arrives on Netflix
moments.blurb: Millie Bobby Brown returns as Enola Holmes in the highly anticipated third film, 'Enola Holmes 3', which premieres on Netflix on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: New Film Drop
angles.copy: Sherlock's sister is back! 'Enola Holmes 3' drops on Netflix this Wednesday. Get ready for more mystery and adventure.

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Looking for a new family watch? 'Enola Holmes 3' with Millie Bobby Brown hits Netflix on July 1st. What mysteries will she solve this time?

moments.title: Love Island Dominates ITVX Chart
moments.blurb: The latest series of 'Love Island' is currently the most-watched show on ITVX, proving its continued popularity with viewers across the UK.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: Still hooked on 'Love Island'? It's officially the most-streamed show on ITVX right now. Who's your favourite couple (or drama stirrer)?

angles.name: Summer Viewing
angles.copy: Island fever is sweeping the nation! 'Love Island' is topping the charts on ITVX. Are you tuning in every night?

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday Mike Skinner
moments.blurb: Mike Skinner, the mastermind behind The Streets, celebrates his 48th birthday on Sunday, June 28, 2026.

angles.name: Streets Icon
angles.copy: Original Pirate Material! Happy 48th Birthday to the one and only Mike Skinner from The Streets. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Garage Legend
angles.copy: Raising a glass to Mike Skinner of The Streets, turning 48 tomorrow! From 'Dry Your Eyes' to 'Blinded by the Lights', his impact is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on Monday, June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish you were celebrating with Nicole Scherzinger? The Pussycat Dolls star turns 48 on Monday! Send her some birthday love!

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! From pop anthems to West End stages, she does it all.

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the iconic Missy Elliott this Wednesday. A true pioneer of hip-hop and R&B.

angles.name: Legendary Producer
angles.copy: From 'Work It' to countless hits she's produced, Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st. What's your favourite Missy track or collaboration?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the legendary frontwoman of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Call Me! The one and only Debbie Harry of Blondie turns 81 this Wednesday. Still an absolute icon. What's your favourite Blondie song?

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to rock goddess Debbie Harry on July 1st! Forever cool, forever influential.

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday Post Malone
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on Saturday, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone, turning 31 this Saturday! From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles', he's delivered so many bangers. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the versatile Post Malone on July 4th! Always pushing boundaries with his music.

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 next Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to Ringo Starr on July 7th! A true legend of music history.

moments.title: UK Schools Break for Summer
moments.blurb: For many schools across the UK, especially in Northern Ireland and Scotland, the summer holidays begin this week, with other regions following in mid-July.

angles.name: Holiday Mood
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many across the UK are officially on their summer break. What are your plans for the long holidays?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here for some, and fast approaching for others! Time for family adventures, staycations, or just relaxing.

moments.title: Sullivan's Crossing Season 4 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The fourth season of the popular drama series 'Sullivan's Crossing' is set to premiere on Netflix on Tuesday, June 30, 2026.

angles.name: New Season Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for more drama! 'Sullivan's Crossing' Season 4 arrives on Netflix this Tuesday. What are you hoping to see happen?

angles.name: Binge Watch
angles.copy: The next season of 'Sullivan's Crossing' is almost here! Perfect for a mid-week binge on Netflix from June 30th.
